LANDING.SUBTITLE: Build the perfect Discord experience for your community.
LANDING.SUBTITLE2: 100% Customizable. Powered by a flexible plugin system.
LANDING.HERO_SLIDE2_DESC: Extend your bot with plugins based on WordPress model.
LANDING.HERO_SLIDE2_DESC2: Dashboard & Bot Commands in one system – completely modular!
LANDING.HERO_SLIDE3_DESC2: Everything from one dashboard – no chaos with multiple bots!

FEATURES.TITLE: Why Communities Choose DuneBots
FEATURES.CARD_ONE_DESCRIPTION: Add, remove, or update plugins with a click. Choose from a growing library —no limits.
FEATURES.CARD_TWO_DESCRIPTION: Extend the bot with our own custom plugins and integrations.
FEATURES.CARD_THREE_DESCRIPTION: Get access to exclusive premium plugins and features that enhance your community experience.
FEATURES.CARD_FOUR_DESCRIPTION: Experience a modern dashboard design with advanced features and customization options.
FEATURES.CARD_FIVE_DESCRIPTION: Easily scale your community. DuneBot is optimized for large servers and provides reliable performance.
FEATURES.CARD_SIX_DESCRIPTION: Tailor DuneBot to your needs with a variety of customization options.
FEATURES.CARD_SEVEN_DESCRIPTION: Experience a new hooking system! In the dashboard and in the bot.
FEATURES.CARD_EIGHT_DESCRIPTION: Scale your community with ease. DuneBot is optimized for large servers and provides reliable performance.
FEATURES.CARD_NINE_DESCRIPTION: Customize DuneBot to your needs with a variety of customization options.

FOOTER.DESCRIPTION: DuneBot is a Discord Bot platform that allows you to manage and customize your bot with a modern dashboard. With a wide range of plugins that are easy to manage.

PRIVACY.SCOPE_TEXT: This privacy policy applies to the Discord bot DuneBot and describes what personal data is processed and how it is protected.
PRIVACY.SECTION1_TEXT: Responsible for data processing within the meaning of data protection laws is:
PRIVACY.SECTION2_INTRO: DuneBot exclusively processes data necessary for the bot's functionality. This includes:
PRIVACY.SECTION2_ITEM1: Discord User ID: for unique player identification
PRIVACY.SECTION2_ITEM2: Username and server name (optional): for display on the Dune map
PRIVACY.SECTION2_ITEM3: Map positions, markers, command inputs: for game interaction
PRIVACY.SECTION2_NOTE: No sensitive or personal content such as message content, email addresses, or IP addresses is stored.
PRIVACY.SECTION3_INTRO: The collected data is used to:
PRIVACY.SECTION3_ITEM1: Provide features like map storage and display
PRIVACY.SECTION3_ITEM3: Technically operate the bot (error diagnosis, logs)
PRIVACY.SECTION3_NOTE: No data is sold, analyzed, or used for advertising purposes.
PRIVACY.SECTION4_TITLE: 4. Where and How Long is Data Stored?
PRIVACY.SECTION4_P1: Data is stored on a private server or cloud service, secured by common technical measures.
PRIVACY.SECTION4_P2: Data is only stored as long as it is necessary for the bot's functionality.
PRIVACY.SECTION4_P3: Upon request, data can be completely deleted (see Section 6).
PRIVACY.SECTION5_INTRO: No data is shared with third parties unless:
PRIVACY.SECTION5_ITEM2: the user has given explicit consent.
PRIVACY.SECTION6_INTRO: You have the right at any time to:
PRIVACY.SECTION6_ITEM3: Restrict or object to its processing.
PRIVACY.SECTION6_NOTE: Please contact us using the contact information above or below.
PRIVACY.SECTION7_TEXT: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy at any time. Changes will be published on this page.
PRIVACY.SECTION8_TEXT: For questions about the privacy policy, please contact:

TOS.SCOPE_TEXT: These terms of service apply to the Discord bot DuneBot and the use of the dashboard.
TOS.SECTION1_TEXT: By using DuneBot, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the bot.
TOS.SECTION2_ITEM1: You must be at least 13 years old (according to Discord guidelines).
TOS.SECTION2_ITEM2: You may not use the bot for illegal, harmful, or harassing purposes.
TOS.SECTION2_ITEM3: The bot is exclusively intended for use on Discord servers.
TOS.SECTION3_ITEM1: DuneBot offers various features related to the Dune game and Discord.
TOS.SECTION3_ITEM2: The scope of features may change or be expanded at any time.
TOS.SECTION4_P1: DuneBot is provided as is without guarantee of availability, accuracy, or error-free operation.
TOS.SECTION4_P2: The developer is not liable for direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of the bot.
TOS.SECTION5_INTRO: DuneBot may store the following data:
TOS.SECTION5_ITEM2: Map data, position entries, and timestamps
TOS.SECTION5_P1: This data is not shared with third parties and is only used for the bot's functionality.
TOS.SECTION5_P2: Note: For detailed information, see our
TOS.SECTION6_TEXT: These terms of service may be changed at any time. Significant changes will be announced via Discord or in the repository.
TOS.SECTION7_TEXT: For questions or issues, please contact us via

NEWS.DESCRIPTION: Stay up to date with the latest developments, updates, and announcements regarding DuneBot.
